LAW AND MOTION 301, ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT NATIONAL UNION FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO INCLUDE ALLEGATIONS CONCERNING DEFENDANT'S LIABILITY AS A PRIMARY INSURER; OTHERWISE OVERRULED. MS. FREEMAN IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, THIS MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT NATIONAL UNION FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO ADMIT LAWRENCE KLEIN AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gwen Freeman of Knapp Petersen & Clarke, 818-547-5161, appearing for plaintiff and responding party
Michael W. Melendez of Melendez Jones and Hungerford, 925-934-8000, appearing for defendant Travelers Property Casualty Company of America
Timothy D. Kevane of Sedgwick Detert Moran and Arnold, 212-898-4008, appearing for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT NATIONAL UNION FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend to include allegations concerning defendant's liability as a primary insurer; otherwise overruled. Ms. Freeman is to prepare a form of order. (301/PJB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gwen Freeman of Knapp Petersen & Clarke, 818-547-5161, appearing for plaintiff and responding party
Michael W. Melendez of Melendez Jones and Hungerford, 925-934-8000, appearing for defendant Travelers Property Casualty Company of America
Timothy D. Kevane of Sedgwick Detert Moran and Arnold, 212-898-4008, appearing for defendant and moving party

This matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT NATIONAL UNION FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO ADMIT Lawrence Klein as COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
